```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(knitr)

.str <- list(
  split = "(\\\\n)*\\${3}(\\\\n)*",
  sec = "(?<=#sec-)[a-z]+-?[a-z]+",
  char = c(
    "\\\\u0027" = "\u0027",
    "\\\\u003d" = "\\u003d"
  ),
  save = str_to_snake(as.character(Sys.time()))
)

# sections <-
# read_html("https://tinyurl.com/588vkvc6") |>
#   html_elements(".docs-material") |>
#   html_text2() |>
#   pluck(1) |>
#   as_tibble() |>
#   mutate(value = str_split(value, .str$split)) |>
#   unnest(value) |>
#   filter(str_starts(value, "#")) |>
#   map(~ . |> as.list() |> set_names(str_extract, .str$sec)) |>
#   pluck(1) |>
#   map(str_replace_all, .str$char) |>
#   map(~ knit(text = str_split_1(., "\\\\n")))

# # readRDS(here::here("_backup", "2025_11_30_19_04_52_712088.rds"))

# knit_section <- \() sections[[rmarkdown::metadata$sec]]

social_icon <- \(id, icon, fa = "fab") {

  hebstr::glue_qmd("
    <a
      class='link-primary'
      href='{{< var links.<<id>>.href >}}'
      title=<<id>>
      target='_blank'
      rel='noopener'
    >
      <i class='<<fa>> fa-<<icon>> fa-2xl fa-fw'></i>
    </a>
  ")

}

# saveRDS(
#   object = sections,
#   file = here::here("_backup", str_glue("{.str$save}.rds"))
# )
```
